items.title: Dodgers’ Roki Sasaki Offers 4-Word Response On Demotion After Fans Boo
items.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers pitcher sent a clear message about moving to the minor leagues after hearing boos from fans.

Apple Maps is adding a useful new feature for trending places
items.summary: Apple today announced that ads are officially coming to Apple Maps later this summer. In addition to that, however, the company also teased a new feature that Apple Maps should’ve added years ago: Suggested Places. more…

items.title: Sinner downs Michelsen to reach Miami Open quarter-finals
items.summary: Jannik Sinner powered into the Miami Open quarter-finals on Tuesday, defeating unseeded American Alex Michelsen in straight sets to stay on course for the "Sunshine Double".Michelsen rode out that storm but Sinner finally broke through in the 11th game before serving out for the first set.
items.source_name: Yahoo! Sports - News, Scores, Standings, Rumors, Fantasy Games

items.title: Eagles agree to terms with Elijah Moore on a one-year deal
items.summary: The Eagles are signing free agent wide receiver Elijah Moore to a one-year deal, Ian Rapoport of NFL Media reports.

items.title: Marta Suarez's morning class canceled after viral plea to TCU professor
items.summary: TCU's overtime win over Washington ended Sunday at 11:17 p.m. Postgame pressers stretched past midnight. Marta Suarez had class at 8 a.m. on Monday.
